hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.ts|*.tsx) ./node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; fi; true
